headline: ExxonMobil Seeks Guyana EPA Clearance for Ninth Stabroek Development
summary: XOM seeks Guyana EPA approval for Haimara in Stabroek- its ninth development- after regulators require a full impact assessment.

headline: Stocks Mixed Awaiting Fresh Iran News

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Valero Energy, Raises Price Target to $289
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   maintains Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $222 to $289.
